evals.prompt: Add a wiki page about Rust ownership semantics
evals.expected_output: Creates a wiki page in Wiki/ with correct slug naming, type and tags frontmatter, appends a timestamped log entry, and asks clarifying questions before acting

evals.prompt: Capture our conversation about the colour system as a transcript
evals.expected_output: Creates a transcript file under _Temporal/Transcripts/yyyy-mm/ with correct yyyymmdd-{slug}.md naming, type and tags frontmatter, creates month folder if needed, and appends a timestamped log entry

evals.prompt: Let's refine the wiki page on Rust ownership — I want to rethink the borrowing section
evals.expected_output: Reads the existing wiki page, uses AskUserQuestion to explore the design space, captures the Q&A in a transcript file under _Temporal/Transcripts/, updates the wiki page, and appends log entries
